title: papaver dubium subsp. albiflorum
intro: Papaver dubium subsp. albiflorum, also known as the white meadow poppy, is a subspecies of the Papaver dubium plant, which is a flowering plant that belongs to the poppy family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties, which can help to relieve pain, reduce inflammation, and alleviate muscle spasms. The health benefits of Papaver dubium subsp. albiflorum include its ability to promote relaxation, improve sleep, and soothe digestive issues, making it a popular herbal remedy for various health concerns. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
